headline: Stop gaining, start losing—today matters most.
summary: You're gaining when you need to lose 0.67 kg weekly; today, lock in Huel meals and move 45 minutes to build the discipline before Friday hits.
details: Today, eat only Huel pre-portioned meals—remove all snacking decisions now, because your emotional eating pattern kicks in Friday and you need to prove you can execute before temptation. Get 45 minutes on the rowing machine or treadmill this afternoon, no negotiation. You're up 0.1 kg this week and flat for 30 days; reaching 88 kg by June 2027 requires -0.67 kg/week deficit, and today is where you prove you can stay disciplined.
